text: Hello. Yes, kidney stones or stones anywhere in the urinary tract can cause bleeding, and an infection can also cause that. To understand your present state, I would advise you to undergo ultrasonography and intravenous pyelography tests, along with routine blood and urine tests. This possibly can not cause weight gain.
